description: Sector overlay for accounting firms, audit practices, assurance providers, financial reporting professionals, and related professional-services documentation in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Accounting. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Institute of Chartered Accountants, Ghana Act, 2020 (Act 1058)
Companies Act, 2019 (Act 992)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Office of the Registrar of Companies

primary_sources.name: Securities Industry Act, 2016 (Act 929)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Securities and Exchange Commission Ghana

primary_sources.name: Anti-Money Laundering Act, 2020 (Act 1044)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Financial Intelligence Centre

rules.title: ICAG membership, practice, or professional registration evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for ICAG membership, accountancy professional registration, practising certificate, or firm professional status evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Institute of Chartered Accountants, Ghana Act, 2020 (Act 1058)

rules.title: Accounting records and financial statement evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for accounting records, financial statements, audit report, directors report, or company-accounting evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: SEC issuer/licensee audit or accounting standard evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for SEC, issuer, licensee, audited accounts, or adopted accounting/auditing standard evidence.

required_signals: licensed under the Securities Industry Act

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: AML/CFT due diligence controls are documented where professional services are in scope
rules.summary: Checks for client due diligence, beneficial ownership, KYC, risk-based approach, or suspicious transaction evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
